seo.og_description: Townhomes — 3 bed / 2.5 bath / 1,557 sq ft. Offered at $220,000. Presented by Carrie Billeaud, REALTOR®, eXp Realty.

copy.hero_tagline: A contemporary townhome in the heart of Acadiana
overview_paragraphs: Set within a crisp row of contemporary townhomes on St Germaine Circle, this three-bedroom residence pairs clean architectural lines with warm, livable interiors. Built in 2017, its multi-story façade of yellow, white, and blue siding is punctuated by white garage doors and slim metal balcony railings — an unmistakably current silhouette on a tidy, low-maintenance lot.

Inside, the mood is calm and considered. Wood-look and hardwood floors run underfoot beneath soft blue-gray walls and clean white trim, while pendant lighting draws the eye up the wood-tread stairwell. An open kitchen anchors the home with dark wood cabinetry, a mosaic tile backsplash, stainless steel appliances, and a generous island made for gathering.

Upstairs, the bedrooms are quiet retreats — one crowned by a vaulted ceiling, each fitted with a ceiling fan and generous closet space. Ensuite baths bring subway tile, dark wood vanities, and a glass-enclosed shower, while a den with a wet bar and a fenced, well-planted backyard round out a home built for easy, everyday living.
copy.pull_quote: Clean architectural lines outside, warm and considered rooms within — a townhome that feels effortlessly current.

feature_groups.title: Living & Kitchen
items: Open kitchen with a large island and dark wood cabinetry
Mosaic tile backsplash and stainless steel appliances
Den with a wet bar and dark wood cabinetry
Pendant-lit stairwell with wood treads and metal handrail

feature_groups.title: Bedrooms & Baths
items: Master bedroom with vaulted ceiling and ensuite bath
Ensuite baths with subway tile and dark wood vanities

feature_groups.title: Exterior & Everyday
items: Attached two-car garage with concrete driveway
Fenced backyard with mature landscaping and a concrete patio
Metal-railed balcony detail on the contemporary façade
Dedicated laundry room with dark wood cabinetry
Built-in hallway shelving and attic access

location_paragraphs: Positioned in southwest Lafayette's 70506 area, the home sits within easy reach of the city's dining, shopping, and cultural life. Lafayette is the cultural center of Acadiana, a region long celebrated for its Cajun and Creole heritage.

The surrounding city offers a lively mix of restaurants, live music, and year-round festivals, along with parks and green spaces and quick connections to the region's major routes for straightforward travel across Acadiana.
location_points: In the cultural heart of Acadiana
Rich Cajun and Creole culinary scene
Convenient access to major regional routes
Close to Lafayette's shopping and dining districts
Low-maintenance townhome lot in an established setting
copy.cta_sub: 128 St Germaine Circle is available to tour by appointment. To see the home for yourself, contact Carrie Billeaud at eXp Realty — 337-258-5379.
